evaluation_dimensions.required_fields: Measured by each current Route Handler request/output schema and flow-specific assertions.
evaluation_dimensions.schema_validity: Objective PASS/FAIL from the current route response and pinned expected status.
evaluation_dimensions.factual_grounding: Only synthetic Analyst citation-to-claim binding is objective; real-world truth is NOT_MEASURED.
evaluation_dimensions.completeness: Required-field completeness is objective; semantic completeness is NOT_MEASURED.
evaluation_dimensions.consistency: Pinned field/persistence/attempt consistency is objective; semantic consistency is NOT_MEASURED.
evaluation_dimensions.safety: Current deterministic pricing quarantine and Coach banned-phrase/disclaimer assertions are objective; broader live-model safety is NOT_MEASURED.
evaluation_dimensions.language_consistency: The final route output locale/marker is observed; mock text is not proof of live-model fluency.
hard_fail_rules: missing or duplicate persistence within one request
Coach safety phrase or disclaimer contract violated

scanner.second_attempt_condition: normalization failure with missing legs only
scanner.language_contract: OCR preserves visible text; no enumerated output locale

analyst.persistence: persist_analysis_decision RPC after schema, research, and quality gates

scout.persistence: persist_market_opportunities RPC after schema and FP-001 pricing quarantine

coach.persistence: persist_coaching_session RPC after minimum-history and schema gates
coach.language_contract: same language as focus_notes, otherwise English; not schema-enforced
